006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.debug;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestOpAnnotation.*;
023
024import java.util.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
032
033/**
034 * Default implementation of the {@link DebugEnablement} interface.
035 *
036 * <p>
037 * Enables debug mode based on the following annotations:
038 * <ul>
039 *    <li class='ja'>{@link Rest#debug()}
040 *    <li class='ja'>{@link RestOp#debug()}
041 *    <li class='ja'>{@link Rest#debug()}
042 * </ul>
043 *
044 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
045 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestServerLoggingAndDebugging">Logging / Debugging</a>
046 * </ul>
047 */
048public class BasicDebugEnablement extends DebugEnablement {
049
050   private static final AnnotationProvider AP = AnnotationProvider.INSTANCE;
051
052   /**
053    * Constructor.
054    *
055    * @param beanStore The bean store containing injectable beans for this enablement.
056    */
057   public BasicDebugEnablement(BeanStore beanStore) {
058      super(beanStore);
059   }
060
061   @Override
062   protected Builder init(BeanStore beanStore) {
063      var b = super.init(beanStore);
064
065      var resource = beanStore.getBean(ResourceSupplier.class).orElseThrow(() -> new IllegalStateException("ResourceSupplier not found"));
066      var varResolver = beanStore.getBean(VarResolver.class).orElseThrow(() -> new IllegalStateException("VarResolver not found"));
067      var ap = AP;
068
069      // Default debug enablement when no resource-class or operation-method debug setting is in effect.
070      // RestContext.findDebugEnablement() unconditionally pre-publishes an Enablement bean derived from
071      // @Rest(debugDefault=...) → pre-registered Enablement bean → @Rest(debug) boolean flag. Subclasses
072      // only need to read it back here. (Pre-10.0 this method also resolved RestContext.Builder out of the
073      // bean store to read isDebug(); that legacy protocol has been removed.)
074      var debugDefault = beanStore.getBean(Enablement.class).orElse(Enablement.NEVER);
075      b.defaultEnable(debugDefault);
076
077      var ci = ClassInfo.ofProxy(resource.get());
078
079      // Gather @Rest(debug) settings.
080      // @formatter:off
081      rstream(ap.find(Rest.class, ci)).map(AnnotationInfo::inner).forEach(x -> {
082         var x2 = varResolver.resolve(x.debug().value());
083         if (! x2.isEmpty())
084            b.enable(Enablement.fromString(x2), ci.getNameFull());
085      });
086      // @formatter:on
087
088      // Gather @RestOp(debug) settings.
089      // @formatter:off
090      ci.getPublicMethods()
091         .forEach(x ->
092            rstream(ap.find(x))
093               .filter(REST_OP_GROUP)
094               .flatMap(ai -> ai.getValue(String.class, "debug").stream())
095               .filter(Shorts::ine)
096               .map(varResolver::resolve)
097               .map(Enablement::fromString)
098               .filter(Objects::nonNull)
099               .forEach(e -> b.enable(e, x.getNameFull()))
100         );
101      // @formatter:on
102
103      // Gather @Rest(debugOn) settings.
104      // @formatter:off
105      rstream(ap.find(Rest.class, ci)).map(AnnotationInfo::inner).forEach(x -> {
106         var x2 = varResolver.resolve(x.debug().on());
107         for (var e : splitMap(x2, true).entrySet()) {
108            var k = e.getKey();
109            var v = e.getValue();
110            if (v.isEmpty())
111               v = "ALWAYS";
112            if (! k.isEmpty())
113               o(Enablement.fromString(v)).ifPresent(en -> b.enable(en, k));
114         }
115      });
116      // @formatter:on
117
118      return b;
119   }
120}
